source_name: Medexa Internal - UAE Claim Validation Policy

records.description: Every UAE claim must resolve through an emirate-specific routing policy before export or submission.
Payer, member, and facility identity must be present before external claim exchange is attempted.
Diagnosis, procedure, and pharmacy codes must come from regulator-approved or contractually licensed reference datasets.
Claims containing high-cost or controlled service families should be checked for payer authorization requirements before submission.
Outbound claim payloads must be validated against the target platform schema family before transport serialization.
